name: A Gift to the People You Hate
original_name: ของขวัญเพื่อคนที่คุณเกลียด
overview: The shop of a certain person wearing a mask sells gifts for people that you hate. There are four levels of gifts; making the receiver ashamed, scaring the receiver, hurting the receiver, and making the receiver die. Do you hate someone so much to give them this gift? Your hatred is their responsibility.

trailers.title: ของขวัญเพื่อคนที่คุณเกลียด | Official Trailer [Eng Sub]
